scripts.build: node -e "if (require('fs').existsSync('./dashboard/package.json')) { require('child_process').execSync('npm --prefix dashboard install && npm --prefix dashboard run build', {stdio: 'inherit'}); require('fs').cpSync('./dashboard/dist', './dist', {recursive: true}); } else { require('child_process').execSync('vite build', {stdio: 'inherit'}); }"
